title: Client Essentials
description: This modpack contains the essential Client-Side mods for Minecraft to keep the game well optimised along with some key mods used as tools for building and also content creation.
body:
Client Essentials adds the core essential mods that CringyGull uses to run an ideal Minecraft instance, without adding anything that changes the vanilla feel of minecraft unless toggled.

This pack includes optimisation mods, utility mods, building tools, and some small visualisation tweaks with the help of vanilla tweaks: [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

It also comes with a custom totem that is a pink frog called Brog. Don't ask why. The Brog resource pack was put together by CringyGull by re-vamping another frog totem pack, [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brog-resource-pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brog-resource-pack)for more info.

![CringyGull standing in front of his barn and windmill in his forever world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a68446bba50b3ff9b1a616f6ebc12f91f9dba60a.jpeg)

This modpack aims to be minimalistic and easy to customise. 

Mods that Cringy aims to keep every update:

- Axiom
- Continuity
- Controlling
- Cubes without boarders
- Essential mod
- Flashback
- Freecam
- Gamma Utils
- Iris Shaders
- LambDynamicLights
- Lighty
- Litematica
- OK Zoomer
- Sodium
- Xaero's World Map

Cringy plans on making another version that adds more fun and visual client-side mods, stay tuned.
